case_title: ANNETTE JAUREGUI VS. DE SHEN ZHANG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-14-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-14-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---CHRISTINE CHANG. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2015 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAUREGUI, ANNETTE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ZHANG, DE SHEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,088.00 FILED BY JAUREGUI, ANNETTE AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, DE SHEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
